exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: 3 working sets. Matching last week's PR weight

exercises.name: Calf Raise
exercises.notes: 2 sets on the leg press machine

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown (wide)
exercises.notes: Set 1: knee pad too low, sat behind cable. Fixed set 2 onward. Bar to upper chest cue

exercises.name: DB Hammer
exercises.notes: Clean. Wall support used to stop lean-back

exercises.name: DB Hammer
exercises.notes: Form broke — elbow drift at bottom. Tried twice, moved on

exercises.name: Cable Rope Hammer
exercises.notes: Clean form. Confirmed as primary going forward

exercises.name: Reverse Forearm Curl
exercises.notes: New addition — extensors. Palms down, roll to fingertips

exercises.name: Weighted Crunch (decline)
exercises.notes: Bumped from 45 lbs plate to 50 lbs DB held to chest

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Warmup 50×12. Plan weight. Last rep hard on set 3. Beat last week 8-8-7

exercises.name: Flat Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: 4 min rest before set 3 paid off

exercises.name: Decline Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Progressed from 60→65. Total 21 reps. Beat last week's 23 @ 60 lbs in load

exercises.name: Pec Fly (DB)
exercises.notes: Bumped to 30 on set 2-3, dropped back to 25 on set 4

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.notes: +5 lbs from plan (70). 4 sets. Fatigue drop on set 4

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Fatigue drop on 93 sets. 86 is working weight ✅

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown (wide grip)
exercises.notes: +6 kg from plan (66). Bar hit nose on last 3 reps set 3

exercises.name: Close Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: +6 kg from plan (66). Clean sweep. 8th rep grind on set 3

exercises.name: Seated Row
exercises.notes: +6 kg from plan (66). Shaky set 1, clean set 2, heavy set 3

exercises.name: One Arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.notes: +5 lbs from plan (65). All 3 sets clean

exercises.name: Hammer Curl (Cable Rope)
exercises.notes: Elbow position locked by cable. New primary hammer exercise

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
exercises.notes: 3 working + 1 finisher. More total reps than 40 lbs ever gave

exercises.name: Concentration Curl
exercises.notes: 3 sets each arm. Reps dropped with fatigue

exercises.name: Forearm Wrist Curl
exercises.notes: 2 warmup + 2 working. Done later in session

exercises.name: Incline DB Press
exercises.notes: Last rep dip on set 3 = normal fatigue

exercises.name: Flat DB Press
exercises.notes: Longer rest (3.5-4 min) paid off — up from 5-5-5 last week

exercises.name: Decline DB Press
exercises.notes: Moved up from 55! Ready to try 65 next week

exercises.name: Tricep Pulldown
exercises.notes: Cable machine. Strong after all that pressing.
